/* A SystemVerilog Parser*/

%language "C++"
%defines
%locations

%define parser_class_name "systemverilog_parser"

%{
#include <iostream>
#include <string>
using namespace std;
%}

%union {
  int numval;
  string strval;
};

/* SystemVerilog Tokens*/
%token ACCEPT_ON ALIAS ALWAYS ALWAYS_COMB ALWAYS_FF ALWAYS_LATCH AND ASSERT ASSIGN ASSUME AUTOMATIC
%token BEFORE BEGIN BIND BINS BINSOF BIT BREAK BUF BUFIF0 BUFIF1 BYTE
%token CASE CASEX CASEZ CELL CHANDLE CHECKER CLASS CLOCKING CMOS CONFIG CONST CONSTRAINT CONTEXT
%token CONTINUE COVER COVERGROUP COVERPOINT CROSS
%token DEASSIGN DEFAULT DEFPARAM DESIGN DISABLE DIST DO EDGE ELSE END ENDCASE ENDCHECKER ENDCLASS
%token ENDCLOCKING ENDCONFIG ENDFUNCTION ENDGENERATE ENDGROUP ENDINTERFACE ENDMODULE ENDPACKAGE
%token ENDPRIMITIVE ENDPROGRAM ENDPROPERTY ENDSPECIFY ENDSEQUENCE ENDTABLE ENDTASK ENUM EVENT
%token EVENTUALLY EXPECT EXPORT EXTENDS EXTERN
%token FINAL FIRST_MATCH FOR FORCE FOREACH FOREVER FORK FORKJOIN FUNCTION
%token GENERATE GENVAR GLOBAL
%token HIGHZ0 HIGHZ1
%token IF IFF IFNONE IGNORE_BINS ILLEGAL_BINS IMPLEMENTS IMPLIES IMPORT INCDIR INCLUDE INITIAL INOUT
%token INPUT INSIDE INSTANCE INT INTEGER INTERCONNECT INTERFACE INTERSECT
%token JOIN JOIN_ANY JOIN_NONE
%token LARGE LET LIBLIST LIBRARY LOCAL LOCALPARAM LOGIC LONGINT
%token MACROMODULE MATCHES MEDIUM MODPORT MODULE
%token NAND NEGEDGE NETTYPE NEW NEXTTIME NMOS NOR NOSHOWCANCELLED NOT NOTIF0 NOTIF1 NULL
%token OR OUTPUT
%token PACKAGE PACKED PARAMETER PMOS POSEDGE PRIMITIVE PRIORITY PROGRAM PROPERTY PROTECTED PULL0 PULL1
%token PULLDOWN PULLUP PULSESTYLE_ONDETECT PULSESTYLE_ONEVENT PURE
%token RAND RANDC RANDCASE RANDSEQUENCE RCMOS REAL REALTIME REF REG REJECT_ON RELEASE REPEAT RESTRICT
%token RETURN RNMOS RPMOS RTRAN RTRANIF0 RTRANIF1
%token S_ALWAYS S_EVENTUALLY S_NEXTTIME S_UNTIL S_UNTIL_WITH SCALARED SEQUENCE SHORTINT SHORTREAL
%token SHOWCANCELLED SIGNED SMALL SOFT SOLVE SPECIFY SPECPARAM STATIC STRING STRONG STRONG0 STRONG1
%token STRUCT SUPER SUPPLY0 SUPPLY1 SYNC_ACCEPT_ON SYNC_REJECT_ON
%token TABLE TAGGED TASK THIS THROUGHPUT TIME TIMEPRECISION TIMEUNIT TRAN TRANIF0 TRANIF1 TRI TRI0 TRI1
%token TRIAND TRIOR TRIREG TYPE TYPEDEF
%token UNION UNIQUE UNIQUE0 UNSIGNED UNTIL UNTIL_WITH UNTYPED USE UWIRE
%token VAR VECTORED VIRTUAL VOID
%token WAIT WAIT_ORDER WAND WEAK WEAK0 WEAK1 WHILE WILDCARD WIRE WITH WITHIN WOR
%token XNOR XOR
